title: Improve error message for unconnected interfaces
body:
The error message in `test_regress/t/t_interface_typo_bad.out` is confusing for a few reasons
- Instead of `is not found:`, it should probably be `is not connected`
- The error should be in the parent module since that's closer to where a fix would be
- The subsequent errors should probably not be there, as they mask the underlying issue more. I think this can be addressed by changing to v3fatalSrc? But is there a reason this isn't already the case?

If I make fix, I'd like to address all three issues at once, so guidance on getting the error to show in the parent would be appreciated.
